layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A for Marketing, Mode B for Dashboard)

Button.default: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest font-bold px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300
Button.outline: border border-white/20 bg-transparent text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest

Card.style: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 rounded-sm hover:border-zinc-600 transition-colors duration-300

Input.style: bg-transparent border-b border-zinc-700 rounded-none px-0 py-4 focus:border-white focus:ring-0 placeholder:text-zinc-600 text-lg transition-all

Navigation.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/10

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure white text on black background meets WCAG AAA. Use pure white #FFFFFF for body text.

universal: NO GRADIENTS: Use solid blocks of black and white.
SHARP EDGES: Avoid rounded corners larger than 2px.
TYPOGRAPHY AS IMAGE: Use large, bold typography to replace images where possible.
NEGATIVE SPACE: Use extensive black space to create luxury feel.
GRID LINES: Subtle, visible grid lines (opacity 10%) can enhance the technical/precision feel.
anti_patterns: Do not use colorful buttons (blue, green, red). Keep everything monochrome.
Do not use drop shadows. Use borders or contrast for depth.
Do not use default Shadcn radius. Override to 0 or 2px.

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Install fonts: Playfair Display and Manrope. Configure Tailwind colors to match palette.
implementation_order: 3. Build Landing Page (Hero, Services Grid, CTA).
4. Build Booking Flow (Service Selection, Calendar, Form).
instructions_to_main_agent.specific_overrides: Override all Shadcn components to remove rounded corners. Use 'border-zinc-800' for all borders.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Create depth through z-index and subtle borders, not shadows.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
